name: Silver Vanrouge(Equestrian Club)
description:
HORSE BOY! HORSE BOY! HORSE BOY!

I based Silver’s relationship with his horse off of Kevin and Gigi/Oh Too Good, the Australian racehorse on Ticky-Tock(Using my mom's name for it). If you don't know, Oh Too Good is a racehorse who is only taken care of by her trainer/ , Kevin. You could say he's like Oguri Cap's . Since Silver likes animals and they crowd around him, I thought that'd be a good example.
creator: D3C4Y1NG_Helena
